text: Which statement concerning carbon dioxide is FALSE?

options.text: It leaves no dynamic residue on machinery components
It is safe to use near personnel in a confined space
It extinguishes fire by smothering action
It can be utilized safely on electrical fires

explanation: While CO2 is effective and safe for electrical fires, it displaces oxygen and can cause asphyxiation. It is NOT safe to use near personnel in a confined space without proper respiratory protection and prior ventilation.
